info.title: qdk-chem
info.description: Tools for working with quantum chemistry data.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

commands.name: convert
commands.description: Converts between various problem description formats. Note that not all data is supported by all formats, such that data may be lost when converting to formats other than Broombridge.

options.name: from
options.description: Format to use in loading problem description data.

options.name: to
options.description: Format to use in writing problem description data.

options.name: out
options.description: Path to write output to. Data will be written to stdout by default.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Input data to be loaded, or - to load from stdin.

commands.name: normalize
commands.description: Normalizes the problem description data in a given problem description fileby loading and then saving the data in a given format.

options.name: format
options.description: Format to use in reading and writing problem description data.

options.name: out
options.description: Path to write output to. Data will be written to stdout by default.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Input data to be loaded, or - to load from stdin.

commands.name: export-jw
commands.description: Exports a JSON representation of the Jordan–Wigner transformation of the fermionic Hamiltonian for a particular electronic structure problem.

options.name: format
options.description: Format to use in loading problem description data.

options.name: out
options.description: Path to write output to. Data will be written to stdout by default.

options.name: flatten
options.description: If true, flattens resulting JSON (often easier for use in native code).

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Input data to be loaded, or - to load from stdin.
